title: ContentLib Visual Kit
description: ContentLib Visual Kit struct definitions can be made from this JSON, and when converted to JSON, will follow this form.
$comment: This is NOT a copy-paste template! Check the docs to see how to use this! https://docs.ficsit.app/contentlib/latest/index.html

UnrealPath.$comment: Regex that matches Unreal paths to the precision we care about. https://regex101.com/r/x0imyc/1/unit-tests

FileName.$comment: Regex that loosely matches file names to the precision we care about. https://regex101.com/r/CGy1Tp/2/unit-tests

Mesh.description: Full asset path to the Mesh for dropped item and belt display. The path MUST be to an asset inside a packaged mod or the base game.

BigIcon.description: File name of a PNG in your mod's /ContentLib/Icons folder, OR full asset path to an Icon texture, inside a packaged mod

SmallIcon.description: File name of a PNG in your mod's /ContentLib/Icons folder, OR full asset path to an Icon texture inside a packaged mod

FluidColor.description: Controls the color of a Liquid, and the primary color of a Gas

GasColor.description: Controls the secondary color of a Gas
